violations_details.message: Unused block argument - `value`. If it's necessary, use `_` or `_value` as an argument name to indicate that it won't be used.
Unused block argument - `value`. If it's necessary, use `_` or `_value` as an argument name to indicate that it won't be used.
Unused method argument - `include_carts`. You can also write as `in_stock?(*)` if you want the method to accept any arguments but don't care about them.

Unused method argument - `fls`. If it's necessary, use `_` or `_fls` as an argument name to indicate that it won't be used. If it's unnecessary, remove it. You can also write as `next(*)` if you want the method to accept any arguments but don't care about them.

Unused method argument - `fls`. If it's necessary, use `_` or `_fls` as an argument name to indicate that it won't be used. If it's unnecessary, remove it. You can also write as `prev(*)` if you want the method to accept any arguments but don't care about them.
Unused block argument - `i`. You can omit the argument if you don't care about it.
Unused block argument - `i`. You can omit the argument if you don't care about it.
Unused block argument - `params`. If it's necessary, use `_` or `_params` as an argument name to indicate that it won't be used.
